# BekerDev

> BekerDev is a one-person web and app development studio run by Ebubeker Rexha.
> Landing pages shipped in a day, MVPs in a week, and long-form web apps built end-to-end
> in modern React, Next.js, and TypeScript, all done by one developer with no team or handoffs.

## About

BekerDev is a solo web and app development studio based in Shkodër, Albania. It is run
by Ebubeker Rexha, who has worked as a front-end developer at Plan4Better and Niza Global,
and co-founded the data-automation startup Subdivide (top-5 at ACTI YOUTH, Albania).

Every engagement, from design and build to deployment and ongoing support, is done by
one person. There is no team, no junior devs behind the scenes, no agency overhead.

## Services

- **Landing Page in a Day**: a production-ready landing page designed, built, and
  deployed in a single working day. Fixed scope, fixed price.
- **MVP Sprint**: a minimum viable product built end-to-end in a 3–5 day compressed
  sprint. Includes auth, database, core flows, and deployment.
- **Web App Development**: longer, more ambitious full-stack web applications using
  React, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and FastAPI where needed.
- **Dev Partnership**: a monthly retainer for existing products that need reliable
  ongoing development capacity.

All service inquiries go through the contact form at /contact. Prices are quoted per
project after a short discovery conversation.

## Tech stack

React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Vue.js, Supabase, Postgres, FastAPI,
Python. Deployment on Vercel by default.

## Selected work

Recent projects, each designed, built, and deployed in a single working day:

- **Jarna** (/work/jarna): traditional Albanian restaurant landing page in Tiranë
- **Trattoria Venezia** (/work/trattoria-venezia): Italian seafood restaurant landing page in Shkodër
- **Eja** (/work/eja): landing page for the first Italian restaurant in Tirana
- **ATY** (/work/aty): rooftop restaurant and gallery landing page in Tirana
- **Gjeli i Pazarit** (/work/gjeli-i-pazarit): traditional Albanian tavern landing page in Tirana
- **Niza Global** (/work/niza-global): single-day landing refresh for a multi-language crypto platform
